entities.context: Recurring review session for processing pending lessons

relationships.context: Review process applies quality control criteria to each lesson
Lessons are validated against and linked to existing principles
Auto-extraction creates pending lessons for later review
New principles follow module structure and get assigned numbers
Export functionality works with lesson archive
Thread export can include lesson extraction similar to lessons-export
